creator: rozhuk.im@gmail.com
text:
This hack work for me:

	@${REINPLACE_CMD} \
	    -e 's|$$(VBOX_GRAPHICS_INCS)|$$(VBOX_PATH_CROGL_INCLUDE) $$(VBOX_GRAPHICS_INCS)|g' \
	    ${WRKSRC}/src/VBox/HostServices/SharedOpenGL/Makefile.kmk


This works too and looks like correct change of includes order by template system:
	@${REINPLACE_CMD} \
	    -e 's|TEMPLATE_VBOXCROGLR3HOSTDLL_EXTENDS_BY.*|TEMPLATE_VBOXCROGLR3HOSTDLL_EXTENDS_BY = appending|g' \
	    ${WRKSRC}/Config.kmk
